title: Goal
description: A validation checkpoint within a challenge. Goals are defined inline in challenge.yaml files as array items.

code.description: Semantic identifier for this goal (e.g., 'PodRunning', 'DeploymentScaled'). Must start and end with alphanumeric, can contain hyphens. This code is referenced by validator services to track goal completion.

title.description: Short, user-facing name for the goal displayed in the UI.

description.description: Detailed explanation of what the learner needs to accomplish for this goal.
